creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This looks like an architectural problem with SPF while relaying is in 
effect.  The solution would be that let FreeBSD.org's MX to change the 
envelop from while forwarding e-mails, but for now, I have turned off 
the SPF checks to get e-mails passed in.  I will contact with postmaster@ 
to see if there is possibility to get this resolved in another way.
